summary: Backend testing for P1 State Transition Tracking and P2 Escalation Logic complete. 15/16 tests passed (1 skipped). All new endpoints working correctly.

critical.issue: Intermittent ForeignKeyViolationError due to Supabase Transaction Pooler connection isolation
critical.root_cause: Each db.create_*() method commits individually, but with Transaction Pooler (port 6543), committed data may not be visible to subsequent operations that get different pooled connections
critical.workaround: Use reset + seed + simulate-drift instead of first-five-minutes

action_items: FIX (HIGH): Refactor db.py create_* methods to use flush() instead of commit() for batch operations, or use a single transaction wrapper in seeding endpoints
ALTERNATIVE: Change DATABASE_URL to use Session Pooler (port 5432) instead of Transaction Pooler (port 6543) for better transaction isolation
critical_code_review_comments: All state transition endpoints (P1) are working correctly: POST /states/transition, GET /states/{id}/chain, POST /states/{id}/end
All escalation endpoints (P2) are working correctly: POST /escalation/run, GET /escalation/candidates, POST /escalation/manual
Events (state_transitioned, priority_escalated) are correctly created for audit trail
GET /api/how/priorities existing endpoint still works correctly
Transaction pooler issue causes intermittent failures in first-five-minutes endpoint - recommend fixing db.py commit strategy
seed_data_creation: Tests use reset + seed + simulate-drift pattern to create test data reliably
context_for_next_testing_agent: State transition and escalation tests created in /app/backend/tests/test_state_transition_and_escalation.py. All 15 tests pass. The first-five-minutes endpoint has intermittent failures due to Supabase Transaction Pooler - use reset + seed + simulate-drift as reliable alternative for test data setup.

skipped_tests: test_transition_creates_chain (state already transitioned in previous test)

endpoints_tested: POST /api/system/states/transition - creates new state linked to old via transitioned_to_state_id
POST /api/system/states/{state_id}/end - ends state with resolution type (RESOLVED, INTERVENTION, SUPERSEDED, ESCALATED)
verified_behaviors: transitioned_to_state_id field correctly tracks state chain
resolution_type (SUPERSEDED, ESCALATED) correctly set on old state
Chain endpoint follows transitioned_to_state_id links correctly
state_transitioned event created for audit trail

endpoints_tested: POST /api/system/escalation/run - checks all active priorities for duration-based escalation
GET /api/system/escalation/candidates - previews what would be escalated
POST /api/system/escalation/manual - allows operator to manually escalate priority
verified_behaviors: Manual escalation updates priority_band and creates priority_escalated event
Automatic escalation checks duration against thresholds
priority_escalated event created for audit trail

database_issue_details.symptom: ForeignKeyViolationError when creating systems/assets after sites in first-five-minutes
database_issue_details.root_cause: Supabase Transaction Pooler returns connections to pool after commit, next query may use different connection that hasn't seen committed data
database_issue_details.affected_code: All db.py create_* methods commit individually
database_issue_details.recommended_fix: Use flush() during batch operations and single commit at end, OR switch to Session Pooler
